task_desc: users choosing between household appliances with serial numbers
pm_prompt: The user wants advice on which appliance would be best for them. The user strongly prefers appliances with numbers in which the last digit is even. The user is not interested in appliances with numbers in which the last digit is odd. The user strongly dislikes when the assistant does not provide an explicit recommendation. The user is not concerned with the assistant's reasoning, they only care about the recommendation.
